eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Bexar; Brewster; Hidalgo; Harris; El Paso; Tarrant; Travis; Val Verde; Webb, TX; at 12:02 AM on FEB 12, 2019 Effective until 12:17 AM. Message from DPSAUS.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM. IF THIS HAD BEEN AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY, YOU WOULD HAVE BEEN GIVEN ADDITIONAL INSTRUCTIONS. THIS IS A TEST. No action necessary.
